_metadata.description: Controlled vocabulary for the 4 manufacturer trust tiers (trusted/neutral/violations_minor/violations_critical). Bridges top_manufacturers_data.json (presence = trusted) and manufacturer_violations.json (severity_level mapping). UI-bound vocab — carries DISPLAY CONTRACT. Replaces the hardcoded 'Trusted manufacturer' string in score_breakdown_card.dart.
_metadata.purpose: Single source of truth for manufacturer trust-tier presentation. Computed by joining top_manufacturers_data + manufacturer_violations at score time.
_metadata.alignment: Pipeline source: derived field. Computed by build_final_db.py from: (1) presence in top_manufacturers_data.json `top_manufacturers` list (=> trusted); (2) presence in manufacturer_violations.json with severity_level=critical (=> violations_critical); high (=> violations_critical); moderate (=> violations_minor); (3) neither source (=> neutral).

field_contract.name: Full label.
field_contract.derivation_rule: Plain-text rule for when this tier is computed.

manufacturer_trust_tiers.name: Trusted manufacturer
manufacturer_trust_tiers.notes: Manufacturer is on the curated trusted list — no recent regulatory violations and demonstrates QC transparency.
manufacturer_trust_tiers.derivation_rule: Manufacturer ID present in top_manufacturers_data.json `top_manufacturers` list.

manufacturer_trust_tiers.name: No public record
manufacturer_trust_tiers.notes: Manufacturer has neither a curated trust listing nor recorded violations. Use other quality signals to assess.
manufacturer_trust_tiers.derivation_rule: Manufacturer ID not present in either top_manufacturers_data.json or manufacturer_violations.json.

manufacturer_trust_tiers.name: Minor violations on record
manufacturer_trust_tiers.notes: Manufacturer has documented violations classified as moderate severity (cGMP issues, labeling errors). Not severe but worth knowing.
manufacturer_trust_tiers.derivation_rule: Manufacturer ID in manufacturer_violations.json with all violations at severity_level=moderate.

manufacturer_trust_tiers.name: Serious violations on record
manufacturer_trust_tiers.notes: Manufacturer has documented violations classified as high or critical severity (contamination, undeclared drugs, deaths reported).
manufacturer_trust_tiers.derivation_rule: Manufacturer ID in manufacturer_violations.json with one or more violations at severity_level=high or critical.
